headline: 'All Garbage': Billionaire Ken Griffin Says AI Jobs Panic Is Hype Because Companies Can't Raise Billions Without Promising AI 'Will Change the World'
summary: Open social media today and you see doom and gloom everywhere — AI is about to wipe out every job, and there's little hope left for human workers. But billionaire Ken Griffin says much of that panic is just a narrative to justify raising the billions needed to keep the expensive, cash-burning AI race going. Speaking at the World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, in January, the founder and CEO of hedge fund Citadel said that data center spending in the U.S. is projected to reach a whopping $
